feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Build Process Automation
feed.subtitle: SAP Build Process Automation Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Open excel instance activity of SAP Build Process Automation is inactive.
entry.content:
I am using a Mac with desktop agent version 3.25.43. While creating projects in my system, I am not able to use the excel related activities. I have the Excel SDK added in dependencies as well. My excel version is 16.83. Is there something else I need to add, or is this problem related to the Excel version causing the activities to not work?

Regards,

Remya

entry.title: Issue with SAP WebGUI Automation using SAP iRPA - Screen can not be identified
entry.content:
Hi

I am facing a strange issue with WebGUi Automation using SAP Build Automation. The Automation project is working perfectly in our Dev sub-account, it uses webgui to perform data uploades. After I have moved the project to our QA sub-account, I am seeing errors with the screens which I captured. All the screens are giving the following error

The same selection criteria is working perfectly for Dev, but it's failing in QA. I tried updating the selection criteria manually in QA, but it still shows "Can not be identified"

Anyone faced similar issue? 

Thanks

Sandip

entry.title: SAP BTP Process Automation how to Extract Invoice Details
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm trying to build my first process in SAP BTP Build Process Automation following the Tutorial 

Invoice Processing and Approval Using SAP Build Process Automation

The problem is in my developer environment I'm missing the option to add the "Document Template" (see the Screencopies - first one is from the example and the second one is from build studio)

I also checked the dependencies that the Document Information Extraction SDK was added to my project

Would be great if someone could get me back on track.

Thank you 

Andreas

entry.title: Business Partner Creation Approval live Process: 422 Error when enriching data
entry.content:
Hi,

I am configuring the Business Partner creation approval live process flow in SAP build process automation. Currently I managed to configure the live process to a point where I receive the tasks in myinbox. The next step is to enrich the data of these business partners via the myinbox app. However, when I try to submit one of the filled in business partners, nothing happens.

It seems as if the submit button does not work, I do not get any feedback in the myinbox app.

When I open the developer tools in my browser, I see the following

errorThrown is not defined

When I take a look in the source code (developer tools -> sources) , the following is displayed:

Apparently errorThrown is not defined in the code. This is the result of an ajax request that fails.

If I look at the network details, I see two requests when pressing the submit button:

1) X-CSRF token fetch works correctly: 200

2) A PATCH request is quickly executed after the fetch x-csrf token request. This patch request returns 422     Unprocessable Entity.

This gives the following response:

The api that was called:

https://[ID].launchpad.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/BPManagement.comsapbpmEnrich/bpmworkflowruntime/public/workf...

Status of the workflow instance: Running

My questions is: What is meant by invalid endpoint, is there a destination that was not configured correctly? If so, which destination? Or does the issue lay elsewhere?

Any help is appreciated!

More information about the live process can be found with on this link: https://api.sap.com/package/businesspartnercreationapprovalprocess/overview

 

Thank you,

Louis

entry.title: When I am starting Desktop Agent 3 it is getting stuck to Agent starting notification.
entry.content:
When I am starting Desktop Agent 3 it is getting stuck to Agent starting notification.

Im using version: 3.26.54; I reinstalled the desktop several times but no success.

entry.title: API limit for Decision Rules API SAP Process Automation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are facing a strange issue with SAP Build process automation or in terms of usage of SAP Process automation Decision API which is being consumed by Integration service. We are getting a http 429 error ? Can anyone please confirm If there is a limit/threshhold set for decision API or if anyone has faced this issue ? Did check in a SAP help that it is 150 request per second per tenant but it refers to Business Rules and not the new decision ones. Not sure if both are same.

Thanks

Tirthankar

entry.title: Build Process Automation future support
entry.content:
Hi,
I'm looking to automate part of our business process and came upon SAP BPA and IRPAs, this seems to fit our needs however on the PAM support for BPA end 2024, is there a successor to this product or an SAP alternative that is more future proofed?

entry.title: Unable to create a Decision in Build process automation
entry.content:
hi , I am unable to create a Decision in the SAP process automation ,i can able to create a input and output variables but when i click the button of ADD RULE in the rules tab , the button not working 

i tries so many times but nothing was coming when i click the button.

Please give me the solution to add the decision , while all the learning resources have previous version which the UI itself was different.

 

The following error was coming and i can't able to add the rule.

entry.title: Error while creating user with Identity Directory API in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to create external user id using Identity Directory API action project in SAP Build Process Automation with IAS destination. we are executing the creates a user resource action within Automation where we are getting the below error :

The provided destination does not follow the expected structure. Please contact support.

Note : when are executing this action directly from connectors out of the automation we are able to create use id successfully.

Could you please Help or suggest any solution on this error, how we can resolve it.

Thanks,

Rupesh

entry.title: How to utilize the Trigger Workflow Action in SAP BPA Process Visibility
entry.content:
Hello Team, 

We're trying to send escalation in SAP BPA based on the workflow status (at risk) using Process visibility Trigger Workflow Action feature by referring https://help.sap.com/docs/process-visibility/process-visibility-capability/trigger-workflow-action. 

One of the main Prerequisites step to trigger the "System based workflow" is selecting the environmental value by creating a destination in SAP BTP. Yet, despite establishing the destination using "OAuth2ClientCredentials" and integrating it with the SAP BPA service key in BTP, the environmental variable remains empty list within Process Visibility.

Can any one please confirm how to configure the destination for configuring the Trigger workflow action in SAP BTP. Kindly find the attached screenshot for reference. 

 

Thanks,

Ranjith

#SAP BPA

entry.title: Not able to create any decision object using SAP Build process automation trial version.
entry.content:
Upon looking at the UI script , It looks like the code for decision UI is referencing an old version of the ui-core.js which is not supported. Can someone help, need to prepare for demo tomorrow 

 

<script id="sap-ui-bootstrap" src="https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.111.0/resources/sap-ui-core.js" data-sap-ui-libs="sap.m" data-sap-ui-theme="sap_fiori_3" data-sap-ui-compatversion="edge" data-sap-ui-frameoptions="trusted" data-sap-ui-resourceroots="{
"com.sap.spa.rule.managedecision": "./",
"sap.rules.ui": "./sap/rules/ui"
}"></script>

entry.title: "Not all conditions are fulfilled to generate a package." SAP Build Error
entry.content:
Hello Builders,

I am wondering how to get past the following error in SAP Build Process Automation?

"Not all conditions are fulfilled to generate a package.
You cannot create a new artifact of type datatype, because you already have 24. You've reached the maximum number specified in the quotas (20)."

This is a screenshot of the error message:

I received this error while setting up the Process Automation template "Manage Invoices without Purchase Order." This error message does not appear when I try to create a new artifact, but rather when attempting to release the project. All the data types in the template are already created and there are 24 of them. I have released this template before and have not had this issue. 

Any suggestions or hypothesis will be appreciated.

Thank you,

Julien

entry.title: Error 403 when calling Process Automation API on deployed SAP Build App
entry.content:
Hi all,

currently i'm facing an issue, where I receive an error 403 on trying to start my Process Automation workflow with this API: https://api.sap.com/api/SPA_Workflow_Runtime/path/post_v1_workflow_instances.
It's working when I start it with Postman. On the preview-version from SAP Build Apps it is also working fine.

But on the deployed version it isn't working. 
I found out, that the bearer token is missing:

The common request header is filled. It looks like the data query "query.authConfig.authToken" is empty.

Does anybody has an idea what's wrong here? In the past it worked like a charm.

Thanks,
Vincent

entry.title: Unable to change flow line while designing a business process in SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content:
Hello All,

    I am currently designing a business process utilizing SAP Build Process Automation in my BTP Trial Tenant. I am defining a condition where I want a flow line to be changed. However, I am unable to select or edit a flow line. I am not sure, if its an issue with the editor. 

Please check the attached screenshot below and provide guidance.

Thanks and Regards,

     Abhijeet

entry.title: SAP Build process Automation - Document Extraction Service: Missing Rights?
entry.content:
Hi there,

I am currently trying to Automate a process using the Build Process Automation Service. I was planning to use the Document Information Extraction Service in this Automation, but for some reason it doesn't show up if I am looking for it. 

Normally I should be able to select "Document Template" but if I use the Build Process Automation Service, its just not there.

 

Same thing here: I should be able to use an "Extract Data" Activity, but it's not there: 

I assume its because of missing rights, but I don't know which rights could be missing. I am able to use the Document Extraction Service in the BTP, but not inside SAP Build

 

Does anyone know what might be the reason for all of this? Thank you!

Julian

Edit: If I try to run an imported project with an "Extract data"-Action I get this Error:

 

 

 
{
    "uid": "XXXX",
    "name": "Extract Invoice Data",
    "type": "automation",
    "instanceUid": "XXXX",
    "packageUid": "XXXX",
    "packageVersionUid": "XXXX",
    "attended": true,
    "duration": 1,
    "status": "Failed",
    "code": "KO",
    "label": "[requestDoxToken] Error on content received: {\"name\":\"requestDoxToken\",\"tid\":86,\"code\":\"InvalidCommand\",\"label\":\"No bean named 'requestDoxToken' available\"}",
    "exception": "irpa_core.error.Error",
    "stack": "Error: [requestDoxToken] Error on content received: {\"name\":\"requestDoxToken\",\"tid\":86,\"code\":\"InvalidCommand\",\"label\":\"No bean named 'requestDoxToken' available\"}\n    at C:\\Users\\I7XXXX   at o.receiveMessage (C:\\Users\\I7XXXX    at c (C:\\Users\\I7XXXX    at u (C:\\Users\\IXXX    at l (C:\\Users\\I7XXXX    at C:\\Users\\I74XXXX    at o.p [as onEvent] (C:\\Users\\I7XXXX    at process.<anonymous> (C:\\Users\\I7XXXX    at process.emit (node:events:513:28)\n    at emit (node:internal/child_process:937:14)"
}
 
XXXX means real content substituted with "XXXX"

entry.title: Problem with Action with uploaded API specification for output
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to use an Action in SAP Build Process Automation. The Action should simply get the purchase order items from the standard API from a SAP system. First of all, I tried get the API specification through SBPA through the Business Accellerator Hub. The output though, was in the wrong format... it was showing a json forma like { "value": [ {..}]} which did not looked like the response which I should get like I received in Postman. Also the test failed with this kind of output format. 

Then I tried to create a custom Action and configured the standard purchase order API by myself and I uploaded the API specification from the edx file from the Business Accelerator hub. The test of the Action worked and I received the expected output as follows { "d": "results": [{..}]}.

After that, I would like to use the Action within my Automation.

Now comes my problem. For somehow, I am not able to use the output variable of the Action in further functions or even simply in a log message. I always displays the following error:

Log message: The parameter "message" refers to an object that doesn't exist. Please clicke the parameter to change it. Type not found for variable ...

I hope someone can help me out, what I might have configured incorrectly. 

Kind regards,

Markus

SAP Build Process Automation

entry.title: SAP BPA file upload into S4
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm currently playing around with SAP Build Process Automation (BPA) and I'm wondering if there is a way to implement a file upload that consumes an OData service to send data to back to S/4 (on Premise) inside of BPA or by importing an SAPUI5 app/workflow task?

Thanks

entry.title: Is it possible to Import and use a custom fiori/sapui5 application in Build Process Automation(BTP)?
entry.content: As said in the subject I am trying to import a custom fiori application into a process in the SPA BTP Build process automation. I've tried changing the Manifest to include sap.bpa.task and changed the component.js file to include the usual code that is generated when creating a Custom Task UI. Technically while I can import the form into the process, it throws the error shown in the image and won't function in the Inbox as an approval form.

entry.title: Getting data field from Action response using Decision Function in SBPA
entry.content:
Hello all, after many attempts over some days I decided to reach out and ask for your help.

Using the Action project I have been able to retrieve data from our user management API spec and the response is like in picture below.

However I am unable to retrieve all content of the response array email field.

I was able to retrieve only the first email abc@gmail.com using decision table, however, my aim is to retrieve all the email from the array as they are email from user management API and all these email needs to get a notification.

I attempted using decision append function, update, foreach loop function but all to no avail. I get no output.

What I want to achieve is getting all the email address from the response array [abc@gmail.com, xyz@gmail.com, 123@gmail.com] and send a notification to them.

I look forward to all the help i can get to this task i am faced with.

 

Thank you

entry.title: Transporting SAP Build Process Automation Projects
entry.content:
Hi,

Customer currently doesn't have SAP CTMS nor SAP Content Agent Service as part of current landscape and looking for whether or not to proceed with using SAP Build Process Automation and building solutions.

Referring to help.sap document contents - Is CTMS and Content Agent Service mandatory for transporting to another sub account BPA tenant (https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/promoting-projects) or manual via export to local system and import into Build Lobby (https://help.sap.com/docs/build-process-automation/sap-build-process-automation/manage-project-across-tenants) and deploy feasible as a manual transport mechanism without CTMS or Content Agent Service to higher environment tenants?


How about Action projects ? 

Pls advise.

 

Regards,

Vipin.
